Project Showcase

Shipped work, concepts and case notes

Live Product · Football · Backend Logic

Live

Footy Futures

A live World Cup 2026 prediction bracket product that lets users submit tournament predictions, follow a leaderboard, and compare outcomes as matches unfold.

SolvesMakes a complex 48-team tournament bracket playable and trackable for fans.
UsersFootball fans submitting predictions and returning to compare leaderboard outcomes.
LogicGroup tables, routing, knockouts, scoring, identities, leaderboard and live-result updates.
Proof200+ players, GA4 analytics, global traffic, leaderboard views and live product feedback.
200+players
GitHubhosting
Supabasedatabase backend
RLSsecurity policies
Leaderboardscoring engine
Zafronix APIlive score layer
GA4user behavior
Feedbackfeature updates

Ops Intelligence Console

How I Build

From user action to working system

Tap or click each card to flip and read the context.

A lightweight build loop for moving from a real user action to a usable product, then improving it from evidence instead of assumptions.

Case Study Framework

How each deep dive will be structured

ContextWhat the project was and why it existed.
User / audienceWho it was supposed to serve.
Job-to-be-doneThe action the user needed to complete.
Product flowWhat the user does from start to finish.
System logicThe logic that had to work behind the scenes.
ImplementationStack, backend, data model, security and integrations.
Metrics / proofUsers, entries, clicks, traffic source, conversion and feedback.
IterationsWhat broke, what changed and why the fix mattered.
Trade-offsWhat I deliberately did not build yet.
Next improvementsGrounded roadmap thinking, not vague ambition.
